ddls:
CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the group (public, org, private) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "is_fav" INTEGER /* Whether the group is a favorite */,
  "is_invitation_only" INTEGER /* Whether the group is invitation-only */,
  "is_view_only" INTEGER /* Whether the group is view-only */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number associated with the group */,
  "snippet" TEXT /* Brief summary of the group */,
  "sort_field" TEXT /* Field to sort the group by */,
  "sort_order" TEXT /* Order to sort the group in */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the group */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the group */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the group */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the group belongs to */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the group is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the tag */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the tag */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_tags_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_thumbnails" (
  "thumbnail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thumbnail */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the thumbnail belongs to */,
  "thumbnail_path" TEXT /* Path to the thumbnail file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the thumbnail was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the thumbnail */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the thumbnail */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the thumbnail */,
  "thumbnail_size" INTEGER /* Size of the thumbnail file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thumbnail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_thumbnails_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "password_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password update */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "lockout_until" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the account will be unlocked after multiple failed attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_groups" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was added to the group */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user-group relationship */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who added the user to the group */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the user-group relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geospatial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geospatial data */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the data belongs to */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of geospatial data (e.g., basemap, map service) */,
  "data_path" TEXT /* Path to the geospatial data file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the geospatial data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the geospatial data */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the geospatial data */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the geospatial data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the geospatial data */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the geospatial data file in bytes */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the geospatial data file (e.g., shp, mxd) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the geospatial data */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the geospatial data is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_data_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geospatial data the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_size" INTEGER /* Size of the version file in bytes */,
  "version_format" TEXT /* Format of the version file (e.g., shp, mxd) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES geospatial_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geospatial data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access log was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES geospatial_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geospatial data the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the comment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the comment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the comment */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is flagged for review */,
  "flagged_reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES geospatial_data ("data_id")
)
